query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "formalizing latent thoughts: four axioms of thought representation in " linguistics
rationale: The paper focuses on computational drug discovery and antibody design using a model named "Latent-X2," which is entirely off-domain from the user's question regarding the linguistic formalization of latent thoughts in LLMs. Although both contexts involve the concept of "latent" representations, the paper addresses a distinct biological construct (immunogenicity and molecular binding) rather than the linguistic or cognitive mechanisms specified in the user's query, failing all inclusion criteria
